description: Migration: after apply, `appointment_requests` has nullable columns online_meeting_provider, online_meeting_url, online_meeting_id with correct types.
Migration: after apply, `teams_integrations` has nullable column default_meeting_organizer_upn.
createTeamsMeeting unit test (happy path): given a ready profile and organizer UPN, returns { joinWebUrl, meetingId } matching the mocked Graph response.
createTeamsMeeting returns null and logs a WARN when Graph responds 403 (missing OnlineMeetings permission).
createTeamsMeeting returns null and logs a WARN when Graph responds 404 (organizer UPN not found).
createTeamsMeeting returns null and logs a WARN when token fetch fails (invalid client secret).
createTeamsMeeting returns null when teams_integrations row is absent or install_status != 'active'.
createTeamsMeeting returns null when default_meeting_organizer_upn is NULL.
updateTeamsMeeting PATCHes with correct ISO-8601 UTC start/end and returns true on 200.
updateTeamsMeeting returns false and logs WARN on Graph 404 (meeting already deleted).
deleteTeamsMeeting returns true on 204 and false on any error; logs WARN on failure.
getTeamsMeetingCapability returns { available: false, reason: 'not_configured' } when no teams_integrations row exists for tenant.
getTeamsMeetingCapability returns { available: false, reason: 'not_configured' } when install_status is 'install_pending' or 'error'.
getTeamsMeetingCapability returns { available: false, reason: 'no_organizer' } when install_status is 'active' but default_meeting_organizer_upn is NULL.
getTeamsMeetingCapability returns { available: true } when install_status='active' AND default_meeting_organizer_upn is set.
getTeamsMeetingCapability returns { available: false, reason: 'ee_disabled' } when EDITION is not 'ee'.
CE build (npm run build without EE) compiles without any reference to ee/packages/microsoft-teams.
CE shim returns no-op handlers: createTeamsMeeting/updateTeamsMeeting/deleteTeamsMeeting all resolve to null/false when EE is unavailable, without throwing.
Schema test: approveAppointmentRequestSchema accepts generate_teams_meeting=true, generate_teams_meeting=false, and omission (defaults to false).
Approval integration test: with toggle on and Teams configured, approving inserts join URL into appointment_requests and email payload includes onlineMeetingUrl.
Approval integration test: with toggle OFF, no Graph call is made and online_meeting_* columns remain NULL.

Approval integration test: with toggle ON but capability unavailable (no organizer), no Graph call is made, appointment is approved without meeting columns, returns teamsMeetingWarning='no_organizer' or equivalent.
Approval integration test: Graph returns 500 → approval still succeeds, columns remain NULL, response includes teamsMeetingWarning, email is sent WITHOUT the join button block.
Reschedule integration test: updating final_date/final_time calls updateTeamsMeeting with the new ISO times when online_meeting_id is present.
Reschedule integration test: Graph PATCH failure → reschedule succeeds; response includes teamsMeetingWarning.
Reschedule integration test: updating a request WITHOUT online_meeting_id does not call Graph.
Cancel integration test: cancelling an approved appointment with online_meeting_id calls deleteTeamsMeeting.
Delete integration test: deleting a schedule_entry for an approved appointment with online_meeting_id calls deleteTeamsMeeting.
Cancel/delete integration test: Graph DELETE failure → cancel succeeds with a warning response; logs WARN.
UI (Playwright): cancel confirmation dialog shows warning text 'This will also delete the Microsoft Teams meeting' when appointment has online_meeting_url.
UI (Playwright): cancel confirmation dialog does NOT show Teams warning when appointment has no online_meeting_url.
UI (Playwright): approval form in AppointmentRequestsPanel shows the Teams toggle when capability returns available, default checked.
UI (Playwright): approval form in AppointmentRequestsPanel does NOT render the Teams toggle when capability returns { available: false }.
UI (Playwright): EntryPopup pending approval view shows the same Teams toggle when capability is available.
UI (Playwright): EntryPopup approved banner renders 'Join Teams Meeting' button only when online_meeting_url is present; opens in new tab.
UI (Playwright): AppointmentRequestsPanel detail view shows the Teams join URL for approved requests that have a stored URL.
UI (Playwright, client portal): AppointmentRequestDetailsPage renders a primary 'Join Teams Meeting' button when online_meeting_url is populated.
UI (Playwright): AvailabilitySettings shows the 'Teams Meetings' tab only when teams_integrations.install_status = 'active' for the current tenant.
UI (Playwright): setting + saving organizer UPN in Teams Meetings tab persists the value and triggers capability to flip to available.
Verify button calls Graph /users/{upn} and returns valid:true with displayName for an existing user.
Verify button returns valid:false with reason='user_not_found' when Graph returns 404.
Verify button returns valid:false with reason='policy_missing' when a deeper check fails with specific Graph error code for application access policy.
Permission test: setDefaultMeetingOrganizer rejects callers without the required tenant_integrations:update permission.
Template render test: appointment-request-approved-client renders the Join button when onlineMeetingUrl is present and omits it otherwise.
Template render test: appointment-assigned renders the Join button for the assigned technician when onlineMeetingUrl is present.
ICS generator test: when url + location are supplied, the ICS output contains a URL line matching the join URL and LOCATION: Microsoft Teams Meeting.
ICS generator test: when url is absent, no URL line is emitted and LOCATION is unset.
i18n validator (scripts/validate-translations.cjs) reports 0 errors / 0 warnings after adding new keys and regenerating pseudo-locales.
Docs: docs/integrations/teams-meetings-setup.md exists and links are reachable from the Teams Meetings tab's prerequisites banner.

Observability: during a full approve + reschedule + cancel lifecycle, three structured log lines are emitted (create, update, delete) each containing tenant, appointment_request_id, operation, status.
Multi-tenant isolation test: creating a Teams meeting for tenant A never surfaces or reuses credentials/profile of tenant B.
Timezone test: approving a request whose requester_timezone is non-UTC produces Graph startDateTime / endDateTime in correct UTC instants that round-trip to the requester's local time.
Regression: CE build succeeds without EE package available (validates the dynamic-import guard).
Regression: EE build succeeds and all new UI surfaces type-check.
